input.command:
python -c "
import json

# Check NF-OSI schema
nf_data = json.load(open('nf-osi_nf-metadata-dictionary/BiospecimenTemplate.json'))
nf_props = nf_data.get('properties', {})

print('=== NF-OSI BiospecimenTemplate ===')
print('individualID:')
print(json.dumps(nf_props.get('individualID'), indent=2))
print()
print('tumorType:')
print(json.dumps(nf_props.get('tumorType'), indent=2)[:500])
"
